The '''FX-10 medical assistant droid''' was a model of [[Medical droid/Legends|medical droid]] that was manufactured by [[Medtech Industries/Legends|Medtech Industries]], as part of the [[FX-series medical assistant droid/Legends|FX-series]] of medical assistant [[Droid/Legends|droids]]. It was the successor of the [[FX-9 surgical assistant/Legends|FX-9 model]]. FX-10s were used in the [[Aurora Medical Facility]] on [[Obroa-skai/Legends|Obroa-skai]].

==Appearances==
*[[Millennium Falcon (novel)|''Millennium Falcon'']] {{Ab|Millennium Falcon (audiobook)}} {{1st}}
